text:
Once upon a time in little Owlwood Forest lived tiny owllets named Oliver and Otavia. They loved exploring whispers of moonlight. Late-night flights brought them giggles. Among the shadows grew an ancient elm.

One moonlit night, Oliver whispered secrets. He learned magic seeds. Late nights grew blooms. The forest dreamed.

Oliver cared. So did Otavia. Seasons spun.

Their whispers grew dreams. Seasons healed. Trees loved.

Forever friends. They fluttered away.
